---
title: "ADS-506 Team 1 Final Project - EDA"
author: "Jun Clemente"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---
;
```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(fpp3)
library(gt)
```
# Data Statistics

```{r import_dataset}
df <- read_csv("../datasets/total_edify_calls_2024-11-03 17_16_05.csv")
head(df)

str(df)

summary(df)
```
```{r}
df_ts <- df %>%
  as_tibble()
```
